patterns: What kind of university is LGU?
responses: LGU is a recognized private university in Lahore offering undergraduate, graduate, and postgraduate programs across multiple disciplines.
I don’t have an official name, but some people like to call me the LGU Assistant, ready to help with a smile!

patterns: What is the address of Lahore Garrison University?
responses: LGU is located in DHA Phase‑VI Sector C, Lahore, Punjab, Pakistan.
LGU was established in 2010.

patterns: Is Lahore Garrison University HEC recognized?
responses: Yes — LGU is recognized by the Higher Education Commission of Pakistan.

patterns: What is the motto of LGU?
responses: “Nurturing the Future of Pakistan in an Excellent Environment.”

patterns: What is the official website of LGU?
responses: The official website of LGU is https://www.lgu.edu.pk
You can contact LGU at +92‑42‑37181827 or via email at info@lgu.edu.pk

patterns: Does LGU have an alumni network?
responses: Yes — LGU’s Alumni Portal allows graduates to stay connected and network.
Yes — LGU publishes several research journals across departments.

patterns: What are the faculties of LGU?
responses: LGU has four main faculties: Social Sciences, Computer Sciences, Languages, and Basic Sciences.

patterns: How do I apply for admission?
responses: You can apply online through the LGU Admissions Portal.

patterns: What documents are required for admission?
responses: Academic transcripts, ID (B-form/CNIC), photographs, and other program-specific documents are required.

patterns: Can I apply for more than one program?
responses: One application per program is generally allowed.

patterns: What is the minimum eligibility for undergraduate admission?
Minimum marks for BS admission at LGU
What is admision ciretria in lgu
responses: The minimum eligibility is 50% marks in the previous level (matric/intermediate), depending on the program.

patterns: What is the minimum eligibility for graduate admission?
Minimum CGPA for MS/MPhil admission at LGU
responses: The minimum eligibility for graduate admission is a Bachelor’s degree with at least 2.0 CGPA or equivalent marks.

patterns: Does LGU require an entry test?
responses: Some programs may require entry tests or interviews.

patterns: How can I check my admission status?
responses: Log in to the admissions portal and select “Check Admission Status.”

patterns: Meaning of 'On Merit' in LGU admission
responses: It means your application has been shortlisted based on academic performance.

patterns: How can I edit my application?
responses: Use the “Edit Application” feature on the admissions portal before the deadline.
Merit lists are posted on the portal once evaluations are complete.

patterns: Can I apply for scholarships during admission?
responses: Yes — scholarship applications can be submitted with the admission form.

patterns: Are there concessions for defence personnel?
Fee concession for armed forces wards at LGU
responses: Yes — wards of armed forces may receive fee concessions.

patterns: What is the Spring admission deadline?
responses: Exact dates are published on the portal each semester.
Yes — international students can apply following the same portal procedure.

patterns: Are there age limits for admission?
responses: No strict age limits; eligibility is based on academic qualifications.

patterns: List of undergraduate programs at LGU
responses: BS Computer Science, Software Engineering, IT, Psychology, Mass Communication, Economics, and more are offered.
Yes — LGU offers MS/MPhil programs in selected departments.

patterns: Does LGU have an MBA program?
responses: Yes — LGU offers MBA programs.

patterns: Can I switch majors after admission?
responses: Department changes are subject to availability and approval.

patterns: How can I see the list of departments?
Where to find LGU departments list
responses: Departments are listed on the official website and student portal.

patterns: Are there short courses or diplomas?
responses: Yes — LGU may offer short courses; check announcements on the portal.

patterns: Are online or hybrid programs available?
responses: LGU primarily offers on-campus programs; check portal for updates.

patterns: Can I enroll in multiple programs simultaneously?
Studying two programs at once at LGU
responses: No — students are generally allowed only one active program at a time.
Some departments offer certifications in addition to degrees.

patterns: Are evening or weekend programs offered?
responses: Currently, most programs are daytime; check portal for special programs.
